creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Thanks, and for future reference: 

> … Ports maintainers are automatically notified by portscout when a new 
> version of an application becomes available. A patch to update that port 
> to the newest version, however, would be welcome.

– How to Submit a Bug Report – FreeBSD Foundation, via 
  <https://wiki.freebsd.org/Bugzilla>
